login_to_openwebui: login to the Open WebUI API with email and password to get an auth token
login_with_env_vars: login to Open WebUI using CODER_CHAT_URL, CODER_CHAT_EMAIL, and CODER_CHAT_PASSWORD environment variables
login_with_custom_url: login to Open WebUI by passing a custom base_url instead of relying on environment variables
login_verbose_mode: login to Open WebUI with verbose logging enabled to see the signin request details
review_login_error_handling: review the login_to_openwebui function error handling for bad request and network failures
